examples: Objectives: to discuss the role of microevolution of Cryptococcus neoformans.
The idea that microevolution happens faster in warmer environments is not new.
Microevolution looks at changes within species overtime ‚ÄĒ changes that may be preludes to speciation, the origin of newspecies.
For Darwin, macroevolution is just microevolution aggregated over long periods of time and space.
